title: FireBall(throw)
description: CraftRise, SonPlayer, HyPixsel Etc. Would you like to throw fireballs in the normal Minecraft Launcher, just like on the servers? So here is FireBall Mode
body:
CraftRise, SonPlayer, HyPixsel Etc. Would you like to throw fireballs in the normal Minecraft Launcher, just like on the servers? So here is FireBall Mode

FireBall Mode:
FireBall Mod Adds Throwable Fireballs to Minecraft Also Has Its Own Special Tab
FireBall Mode Explodes and Damages the Thrown Place. Unfortunately, It Doesn't Make Anyone Fly When It Comes On It It Just Burns. A Fireball Traveling at 60km per Hour Causes Destruction Where It Hits.

Features of the Mod:
FireBall Mode Not Makes the Existing Fireball in the Game Throwable Just Like Ghast!.
Adds an Alternate Throwable Fireball in Its Replacement

Now, it is possible to produce a fireball in the 1.2.1 version of the mod!
